rationale: Educ. Code §12.264 governs acceptance of gifts and grants for adult education charter programs. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The commissioner or an adult education program operated under a charter granted under this subchapter may accept gifts, grants, or donations from any public or private source to be used for purposes of this subchapter.
_note: No conflict. Rule is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
